topic: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table, front view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: front view: Hands place the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro box on a wooden table, frame centered.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: close-up: Fingers lift the lid, revealing the iPhone 16 Pro inside the Desert Titanium box.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: top-down: Hands lift the iPhone 16 Pro from the box, Desert Titanium finish gleaming on the wooden surface.
parsed_generation.narration: A tight, cinematic unboxing sequence progresses from front view to close-up to top-down, revealing the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro on a wooden table. The hands and box remain the sole focus, delivering a clean, product-forward moment.

feedback: The prompt stays on topic with Desert Titanium and a wooden surface, but it diverges from the gold standard by using a front-view opening and omitting key mid-shot details (sealed lid reveal, side-angle lift showing the phone’s profile and camera bump, and a macro close-up). To better align, add a top-down opening shot of a sealed box, a side-angle lift of the phone to reveal its form, a macro shot of film/screen interaction, and consider incorporating an SFX cue. This will enhance cinematic cadence and timestamp granularity.
strengths: Clear, concise shot labels and timestamps
Consistent product-forward focus on Desert Titanium iPhone on a wooden surface
